'''Grom Goluum''' was the owner of a [[Hangar/Legends|docking bay]] in [[Ord Mynock Freeport]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ord Mynock/Legends|Ord Mynock]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] was an honest, hardworking [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]].<ref name="Game" />

Grom was happiest when he was fixing or modifying starships. If he was left for too long with a ship, he could not resist tinkering with its systems until it either exceeded its design limits or suddenly failed.<ref name="Game" />
